questions.text: If you could have any superpower, which would you pick? Why?
If a magic mirror could tell you the truth about yourself, life, the future, or anything else, what would you want to know?
If you could trade places with anyone for one week, who would you trade places with?
If you could have a round trip ticket to anywhere in the world, where would you go?
If you could repeat an experience you’ve had in life with someone special to you, what would it be?
If you were stranded on a desert island, would you rather be there alone with high-speed internet, or with another person but no technology?
If you were stranded on a desert island for five years and you could take four other people with you, who would they be?
If you could only take one book and one movie with you to this desert island, which ones would you choose?
If you could spend a month living in any period in history, when and where would it be?
Which two historical figures would you like to watch debate, and on which topic?
If you had to do something really fun or unusual every month for the next year, what would you choose?
If you had to live without one of the following for a whole year—alcohol, sugar, or hot showers—which would you choose?
If you had a million dollars to give away, what would you do with it?
What would you do with an extra $1,000 to spend only on yourself?
If you had to move permanently to another country, which one would you pick?
If you could speak one other language well, which one would you choose and why?
If you could choose your area of study and/or your job all over again, what would you choose?
If you could be part of the first human colony on Mars, would you go? What qualities would you bring?
If you could cure one disease, which one would you pick?
If you could be invisible for a day, what would you do?
If you were to start a business, what would you do?
If you had to make your living as an artist, what would you try to make and sell?
Who is a celebrity you find fascinating or attractive? What draws you to them?
If you could meet any famous person you wanted to, whom would you choose?
If you had to get a tattoo, where would you get it and what would it be?
What would you do with your time if money were of no concern?
If you could be an animal for a day, which one would you choose?
If you could spend one hour doing anything at all, what would you do?
If you were to write a book, what would it be about?
If you could be in the movie of your choice, what movie would it be and what role would you play?
If you could go anywhere for dinner tomorrow night, where would you go?
If you could choose to do something extraordinarily well, what skill would you pick?
If you had to change your first name, what new name would you choose?
If you had the ability to compete in the Olympics, which event would you choose?
If you were in charge of eliminating hunger in the world, where would you start?
If you had to design and teach a class at university, what would you teach on?
If you could redesign and redecorate your home at no cost, what would you do?
If you could relive one year of your life, which would you choose?
How are you feeling right now?
What is something that made you smile today?
What was something that made you feel frustrated today?
What have you been thinking about today?
When did you feel appreciated today?
What is something you did today that that you really enjoyed?
How did you show kindness to someone else today?
What (or who) encouraged you today?
What’s something that you intended to do today, but didn’t? Why not?
Was there anything you wanted to happen today, but didn’t?
What did you learn today?
Tell me two good things and two bad things from the past week.
What is the story from your own life you find yourself telling the most often?
What is one cliché you sometimes catch yourself saying?
What is the joke you tell most often?
Do you prefer exercising your mind or your body? How frequently do you do either?
What is your idea of fun exercise?
What is one of your pet peeves?
What is something that bothers you if it’s not done perfectly? Why?
What is your favorite book, movie, or TV show right now?
What is a poem or song you really love?
What’s your favorite board game?
What is your favorite piece of furniture in your house?
What is your favorite restaurant? What do you love to order there?
What do you daydream about most often?
What does your perfect day look like?
What are you a “natural” at doing?
Which of your personality traits or habits do you work the hardest to resist or change?
What is something about yourself that you hope will never change?
Where is the biggest mismatch in your life right now between what you believe and how you live?
In which ways do you create your own suffering?
What do you wish you were better at saying no to?
What do you spend most of your leisure/entertainment time doing?
Do you tend to play it safe or take risks?
What is something you’d like to do, but are scared to try?
In what situations are you most likely to procrastinate?
What is a “deal breaker” for you in a relationship?
What is something you should probably throw out or give away, but don’t want to?
Is it harder for you to stick to a plan or be spontaneous?
Who is someone you have a difficult time loving?
Which do you need to practice the most: patience, kindness, gratitude, or joyfulness?
Are you more of a leader, or more of a follower?
Are you more of a feeler or a thinker?
What causes you to get flustered?
What time of day do you feel your best?
What is something that amazes you?
Where is your favorite place to take out of town guests?
What’s one thing you’d rather pay someone to do than do yourself?
What are three qualities that draw you to someone new?
Do you spend more time thinking about the past, the present, or the future?
Who is one of your heroes? What do you admire about them?
How important is it to set personal goals?
Are people trustworthy? Explain.
Fill in the blanks: “I used to think ___, and now I think ___.”
What is the most significant problem facing the world?
What is a social or political issue that you feel strongly about?
What is a social or political issue you feel like you need to learn more about?
What is one social or political issue you have changed your opinion about during the last year?
What is a law or custom that would make this world a better place to live in?
What is your favorite quotation? Why do you like it?
What is the ideal age to get married? Why?
Why do you think divorce is so prevalent?
Is it more important in life to be honest or kind? Why?
Is ignorance ever really bliss?
Why are bad habits so hard to break?
What is more important: What you say or how you say it?
Is silence ever really golden? When?
Is it ever appropriate to break the law?
Is conflict a necessary part of a healthy relationship?
If money doesn’t bring happiness, what does?
What is one thing you know for sure?
When is it OK to lie?
Do you agree or disagree with the saying: “An adventure is only an inconvenience rightly considered”?
What is something you’ve achieved that you are really proud of?
What has been your biggest disappointment in life so far?
What has been the biggest challenge you’ve overcome?
Tell me about two things you greatly fear.
Tell me about a time you overcame a fear.
What is the most adventurous or daring thing you’ve done?
Tell me about a time when you felt very loved.
What is the greatest thing you’ve done for someone else?
Tell me about a time you felt very hurt.
Tell me about a time you felt extremely happy.
Tell me about a real sacrifice you have made.
What event in your life has changed you the most?
What is one thing you’ve learned the hard way in life?
What good things have resulted from the suffering you’ve experienced in your life?
What is something you regret having done?
What is something you regret not having done?
What is the most dangerous situation you’ve encountered? How did you react?
What were your New Years Resolutions or goals this year?
Tell me about a New Years Resolution or important goal that you succeeded in.
Tell me about a New Years Resolution or important goal that you didn’t keep.
When was the last time you really pushed yourself to your physical limits?
When was the last time you remember being stunned by beauty (or ugliness)?
Where is the most beautiful place you’ve ever been?
Tell me about something mischievous you’ve done.
What is one book that has changed your life or stuck with you?
What movie have you watched over and over again? Why?
When is the last time you had “butterflies” because you felt so nervous?
What is the most embarrassing gaffe you’ve ever made with digital communication?
Has anything bad ever happened to you that turned out to be for the best?
What’s the wildest animal you’ve been close to?
What is something you’ve won?
What is one of the nicest compliments anyone has ever paid you?
When was the last time you were bored out of your mind?
When was the last time you really wanted to scream at someone?
Tell me about a time you helped (or were helped) by a total stranger.
What is one of your favorite souvenirs from your travels?
What was your first job? What did it teach you?
What is the biggest surprise you’ve ever gotten? How did you react?
When is the last time you told a “little white lie?”
Tell me about a time you successfully resisted temptation.
What life experience has strengthened you the most?
What’s the best job you’ve ever had?
What’s the worst job you’ve ever had?
Who was your first boyfriend or girlfriend? What were they like?
Tell me about a time you laughed when it was inappropriate or mean.
What is something you have done that required great endurance or discipline?
When was the last time you found yourself “walking on eggshells?”
When was the last time you cried?
Tell me about a time when you did something that required courage.
Tell me about a time when you received some amazing news.
When did you feel like you really became an adult?
What do you miss about childhood?
Where did you grow up? What was it like?
What did you do for fun when you were a child?
Can you describe a magical childhood memory?
What did you want to be when you grew up?
What is your earliest childhood memory?
Did you have any pets when you were young? Tell me about them.
What did you get in the most trouble for when you were young?
What was something you did as a child that made you feel all grown up?
What childhood accident stands out in your mind?
Tell me something you did as a child that you feel embarrassed about now.
What was something you were good at or not good at when you were young?
What games did you play when you were little?
Tell me about a significant childhood achievement.
What was your favorite book, movie, and album as a child?
What was your favorite or least favorite subject at high school? Why?
What clubs, sports, or activities were you most involved in during high school?
Did you find it easy to make friends when you were young?
Who was your best friend in high school? Where are they now?
Did you ever cheat at school? Share the details.
What’s something you did growing up that your parents never found out about?
What is one book that you were forced to read in high school that you hated? Why?
What do you think of when you hear the word “home”?
What is a favorite memory with your grandparents?
How did you get along with your siblings while growing up?
What are some things your siblings did that annoyed you when you were young?
What’s the meanest thing you or your sibling did to each other?
What is one thing you admire and respect about each of your siblings?
Did you have an adult mentor figure in your teenage years?
Does your family have a “black sheep”? Who is it?
How did you rebel against your parents while you were growing up?
What are three words that describe your mother?
What are three words that describe your father?
What are some things your parents did well as parents?
What are some things you wish your parents had done differently?
What is one thing you admire and respect about each of your parents?
How are you similar to or different from your parents?
If you could change anything about your relationship with your parents, what would it be?
What are two things you admire about your parents’ relationship?
What is the most important quality in a marriage or partnership?
If you could restore one broken relationship in your life, which one would it be?
Are you more likely to avoid conflict or face it head-on?
Which way do you most prefer to give and receive love: touch, words, or gifts?
Think of someone you greatly respect. What are three things you admire about them?
Tell me about your closest friends. Are you happy with the quality of those friendships?
What’s a valuable lesson you learned from a previous romantic relationship?
How did your family celebrate your birthday growing up?
What would your ideal birthday look like?
What are some of the best gifts you’ve received or given?
What is your favorite holiday of the year? What are your family's traditions?
What is your favorite family tradition?
What was the best or worst vacation your family ever had?
What is your current job or field of study?
What does your typical workday look like?
How do you feel when you wake up in the morning and think about going to work?
What do you most enjoy or find challenging about your job?
Why did you choose this line of work?
What sort of job do you want to be doing in five years' time?
What do you most enjoy spending time doing?
When do you feel most 'like yourself'? Why?
If you had a Saturday all to yourself, what would you do?
What are two of your guilty pleasures?
What are three things you are good at doing?
What are two things you are not good at doing?
What are the biggest sources of stress in your life right now?
To feel rested, how many hours of sleep do you need?
When you feel stressed, how does that show up in how you interact with others?
When you feel sad, what do you do for comfort?
What advice do you give to others about how to manage stress?
What helpful self-care strategies do you wish you were using more regularly?
When you are struggling, how can your partner or friends best help you?
What was your first impression of me? Was it accurate?
What is a favorite memory you have of time we’ve spent together?
How have you had to compromise or change since we got together?
What do you miss most about being single?
What are some things you love about being 'coupled'?
Where was the location of our most memorable kiss?
What is the silliest disagreement we’ve had so far?
Which of us is more likely to start an argument?
What was one of our best dates ever?
What is something I’ve done that melted your heart?
What helps you feel most connected to me?
What is one thing you think we’re 'doing well' in our relationship?
What do you find most challenging about our relationship?
Have you ever felt jealous during our relationship?
Are you open to the possibility of relocating for this relationship?
How did your parents make decisions about money?
Do you have any outstanding loans or debts?
What is something you would like to change about the way you spend money?
What is the first thing you would buy if you won the lottery?
Is having a nice house or a nice car more important to you?
How much of your income do you give away to charity?
Do you think God or a higher power exists?
Do you believe in life after death?
Would you call yourself religious or spiritual?
Tell me about a time you felt spiritually alive.
Do you believe in miracles?
Do you believe prayer accomplishes anything?
If there is a God, what do you think they want?
If you could, would you choose to know how and when you will die?
